hero.lead: Hi, I'm Hanina N — a dedicated and compassionate psychologist helping individuals and communities manage stress, build resilience and reclaim emotional well-being through evidence-based, judgement-free care.
hero.note: * Confidential first conversation — your details are kept private and used only to reach you.

band.text: A safe, evidence-based space to help you move from overwhelmed to in control — and start living well again.

paragraphs: I'm a Consultant Psychologist and MSc Psychology topper with hands-on experience across counselling, psychological assessment, psychiatric training and mental-health awareness programs. I believe healing starts with feeling truly heard.

From individual counselling sessions and clinical documentation to awareness drives in schools and rehabilitation centres, my work centres on empowering people to understand themselves and manage life's pressures with practical, evidence-based tools.
I'm committed to advancing accessible, effective and stigma-free mental-health care — for students, families and communities alike.

approach.body: Thoughts, emotions and behaviour are deeply connected. My role is to help you read your own story — gently untangling the patterns behind stress, anxiety and self-doubt, and turning insight into practical, lasting change.
points: Focused on understanding the person, not just the problem
approach.imageAlt: Neural brain — interconnected thoughts and emotions

help.sub: Three ways my practice supports your mental health and growth.

cards.title: Talk it through with individual counselling
cards.text: One-to-one, confidential sessions for stress, anxiety, self-esteem and life transitions — guided by active listening and evidence-based techniques.

cards.title: Understand yourself through psychological assessment
cards.text: Structured case-history taking, assessment and clear clinical documentation to map what's really going on — and build a plan that fits you.

cards.title: Build healthier spaces with awareness sessions
cards.text: Engaging talks and workshops for schools, camps and communities on stress, screen-balance, habits and emotional well-being.

expertise.sub: A blend of clinical skill, communication and the human touch.

reels.sub: Short, honest contents on overthinking, self-worth and everyday well-being — as a psychologist & content creator.

contact.lead: Reach out for a confidential conversation. Whether it's for yourself, your child, or your community — let's start where you are.

footer.note: Promoting emotional well-being through evidence-based, compassionate psychological care.
